incorrects.description: Student set Nonfiction bar to wrong height on first attempt

steps.text: Not quite. Check the table: how many Nonfiction books?

incorrects.description: Student set Nonfiction bar to wrong height on second attempt

steps.text: Let's think about this together. The table shows 60 Nonfiction books. Find the line marked 60 on the graph.

incorrects.description: Student set Nonfiction bar to wrong height three or more times. System models the answer.

params.description: System sets Nonfiction bar to height 60, aligning with the 60 gridline.

steps.text: Let me show you how this works. I look at the table: Nonfiction has 60 books. Then I find 60 on the axis. I set the bar to that line. There we go.
